## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss ongoing projects, align on next steps, and prepare for upcoming account handoffs.](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team to pre-fill notes before meetings for more efficient discussions](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Several accounts (Town, Biologica, Engine) nearing steady state; preparing for handoffs](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [New accounts (Airbyte, Metronome, Monograph) in early stages; focus on artifacts and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Team reaching capacity; Sydney joining to help with strategy sprints as additional ME](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

## Topics

### Project Updates and Next Steps

  - [Town: Need freelancer to set up blog in Framer; continue content production](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Biologica: 40+ pieces approved; awaiting knowledge base setup; aligning on imagery tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Engine: Delivering 6 topics this week; meeting tomorrow to discuss strategy and expansion](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Airbyte: Ramping up volume; waiting on Mario for custom workflow deep dive](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Metronome: Kickoff completed; enriching artifacts with new info; scheduling product deep dive](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Monograph: Generating artifacts and ingesting provided materials; awaiting database access](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

### Account Handoffs and Team Capacity

  - [Aim to get verbal approval and prepare for handoffs by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)
  - [Matching accounts to team members based on expertise (e.g., Yorko similar to Engine)](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Sydney joining to help with strategy sprints, bringing total to 3 MEs](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Potential for up to 20 parallel accounts; need to manage context switching](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)

### Content Strategy and Execution

  - [Engine: Aiming for 5 refreshes and 5 new pieces per week](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Airbyte: Working to unblock publishing to reach 100/month](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Metronome: Jo working on content clusters; deep dive on content strategy tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)

### Collaboration and Communication

  - [GeekBot reports for personal organization, not necessarily for others](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

  - [Using stand-ups for deep dives on new account content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/1j-qdEExnTs2H_Eezooy39rGZXrHb6zD?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

### Upcoming Projects and Resources
